semantic.role: Vitest integration test for the ArchSpine CLI pipeline end-to-end flow.
responsibilities: Create temporary directories as isolated test environments using fs.mkdtempSync.
Initialize a Git repository with a fixed branch name and user configuration using execFileSync.
Write wrapper scripts to intercept or mock prompts module behavior during CLI execution.
Execute the built CLI binary (dist/cli/index.js) with various arguments and validate its expected output.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual modules or functions.
Testing of CLI commands outside the core pipeline flow.
Test environment setup or teardown beyond temporary directory and git init.
invariants: Test files must adhere to the project's naming convention: end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.
Each test run must use a fresh temporary directory to ensure isolation.
Git must be available in the system PATH for git operations.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This file provides an end-to-end test harness for validating the CLI pipeline's behavior in a controlled, isolated environment, ensuring core workflow correctness.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Incorporates testing for Windows platform compatibility and addresses test fixes referenced in commit CHK-02 and FIX-02, matching the git intent provided.

English.role: Vitest integration test for the ArchSpine CLI pipeline end-to-end flow.
responsibilities: Create temporary directories as isolated test environments using fs.mkdtempSync.
Initialize a Git repository with a fixed branch name and user configuration using execFileSync.
Write wrapper scripts to intercept or mock prompts module behavior during CLI execution.
Execute the built CLI binary (dist/cli/index.js) with various arguments and validate its expected output.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual modules or functions.
Testing of CLI commands outside the core pipeline flow.
Test environment setup or teardown beyond temporary directory and git init.

Simplified Chinese.role: 使用 Vitest 对 ArchSpine CLI 流水线进行端到端集成的测试文件。
responsibilities: 使用 fs.mkdtempSync 创建临时目录作为隔离的测试环境。
使用 execFileSync 初始化带有固定分支名称和用户配置的 Git 仓库。
编写包装脚本以在 CLI 执行期间拦截或模拟 prompts 模块的行为。
使用各种参数运行构建后的 CLI 二进制文件 (dist/cli/index.js) 并验证其预期输出。
outOfScope: 针对单个模块或函数的单元测试。
核心流水线流程之外的 CLI 命令测试。
超出临时目录和 git init 范围的测试环境搭建或清理。
